nasb.text: All the inhabitants of the coastlands Are appalled at you, And their kings are horribly afraid; They are troubled in countenance.

esv.text: All the inhabitants of the coastlands are appalled at you, and the hair of their kings bristles with horror; their faces are convulsed.

cnv.text: 沿海地帶所有的居民 都因你驚駭； 他們的君王都極其恐慌， 面容扭曲。

ccb.text: 沿海的居民因你而惊骇， 君王都吓得面容失色。
